name: ChillPaths
description: ChillPaths is a relaxing yet brain-teasing puzzle adventure set in a cool, icy world. Your mission is simple: slide frozen bars and clear the way for a little boat to reach its destination. But don’t be fooled—each level brings clever layouts that challenge your logic, planning, and problem-solving skills. Navigate through frosty grids, move blocks in the right order, and unlock the perfect path. With smooth controls, calming visuals, and satisfying “aha!” moments, ChillPaths is designed to be easy to pick up but rewarding to master.
